ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation information for the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central Identifier (PMCID) for the publication */,
  "nihms_id" TEXT /* NIH Manuscript Submission System Identifier (NIHMS ID) for the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) for the journal */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Serial Number (eISSN) for the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "issn_l" TEXT /* Linking ISSN (ISSN-L) of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number (ISBN) for the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Publication year of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_journals" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_books" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_types" (
  "citation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation type */,
  "citation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the citation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_pub" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_publications" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the publication */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the publication */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* h-index of the publication */,
  "g_index" INTEGER /* g-index of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
column_names: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication
PubMed Central Identifier (PMCID) for the publication
NIH Manuscript Submission System Identifier (NIHMS ID) for the publication
International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) for the journal
Electronic International Standard Serial Number (eISSN) for the journal
International Standard Book Number (ISBN) for the book
ID of the author who wrote the book
ID of the publication being cited
Unique identifier for each citation type
Role of the user in the publication
Number of citations for the publication
